place: Plai Laem, Bophut, Koh Samui, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Bedroom Hilltop Villa with 180° Sunrise-to-Sunset Views - Plai Laem
note: Resident staff · daily breakfast · airport transfers
blurb: A five-bedroom villa on a private hilltop estate in the north-east of Koh Samui, between Choeng Mon and Big Buddha, with a rare 180-degree outlook that catches both sunrise and sunset. Open-plan living slides open on two sides to a wraparound terrace and a 14-metre infinity pool above the coast, five en-suite bedrooms, tropical gardens and a resident team — a few minutes from the beaches, airport and Fisherman's Village.
detail:
Set high on a private estate in the sought-after north-east of Koh Samui, between Choeng Mon and Big Buddha, this five-bedroom villa commands a rare 180-degree panorama — the first light of dawn over Choeng Mon Bay to the east, and long, unhurried sunsets over the island's north coast to the west. Spread across two floors, it blends modern tropical architecture with Southeast Asian craft, all oriented to the view.

The social heart is an open-plan living, dining and kitchen space of roughly 100 m², floored in Javanese stone, with large sliding doors that draw back on two full sides to let the hilltop breeze move through. A separate TV room with a built-in sofa and air-conditioning sits off the main space. Upstairs, a wraparound terrace of about 107 m² edged in white bougainvillea frames the horizon, with sun loungers, a shaded relaxation area and a west-facing dining spot that turns atmospheric at dusk.

A sweeping staircase leads down to a free-form infinity pool, 4.5 by 14 metres, that appears to spill toward Big Buddha and the sea beyond, wrapped in tropical gardens kept by a full-time gardener. The five bedrooms all open through floor-to-ceiling glass and are fully air-conditioned; the two master suites have wooden floors and private terraces, alongside two twin guest rooms and a fifth room that steps straight out to the pool.

A resident team looks after daily housekeeping, a complimentary breakfast is included each morning and a private chef can be arranged on request, with 24-hour security and airport transfers. The beaches, restaurants and beach clubs of the coast are a few minutes away, with Chaweng, Fisherman's Village and the airport all roughly ten minutes' drive.

features.l: 4.5 × 14 m infinity pool over the coast
Open-plan living opens on two sides
Tropical gardens on a private hilltop
Resident staff, chef on request & daily breakfast
